{"query":"Kamala Harris security clearance revoked by Trump 2025 former officials list executive action","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1347,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/03/rescinding-security-clearances-and-access-to-classified-information-from-specified-individuals/","title":"Rescinding Security Clearances and Access to Classified Information from Specified Individuals – The White House","content":"Therefore, I hereby direct every executive department and agency head to take all additional action as necessary and consistent with existing law to revoke any active security clearances held by the aforementioned individuals and to immediately rescind their access to classified information.
I also direct all executive department and agency heads to revoke unescorted access to secure United States Government facilities from these individuals."},{"url":"https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c74kg3e2m08o","title":"Trump revokes security clearance for Kamala Harris, Hillary Clinton and others","content":"US President Donald Trump revoked security clearances from his previously defeated Democratic election rivals, Kamala Harris and Hillary Clinton, as well as a number of other former officials and critics.
Trump said in February he was revoking security clearance for his predecessor Joe Biden.
"This action includes, but is not limited to, receipt of classified briefings, such as the President's Daily Brief, and access to classified information held by any member of the intelligence community by virtue of the named individuals' previous tenure in the Congress," the order stated.
Trump also revoked access for high-profile Republican critics, former Representatives Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger.
His order revoked clearance for New York attorney general Letitia James, who brought multiple lawsuits against Trump and his businesses."},{"url":"https://abc7news.com/post/us-politics-president-donald-trump-revokes-security-clearances-kamala-harris-hillary-clinton-other-biden-officials/16069081/","title":"US politics: President Donald Trump revokes security clearances for Kamala Harris, Hillary Clinton and other Biden officials - ABC7 San Francisco","content":"WASHINGTON -- President Donald Trump issued a memo on Friday evening that revoked the security clearances and access to classified information of Hillary Clinton and Kamala Harris, as well as more than a dozen former Biden officials."},{"url":"https://abc7.com/post/trump-cancels-kamala-harris-secret-service-detail-was-extended-undisclosed-biden-order/17683396/","title":"Trump cancels Kamala Harris' Secret Service detail that was extended by undisclosed Biden order - ABC7 Los Angeles","content":"President Donald Trump revoked Kamala Harris' Secret Service protection on Thursday, according to a copy of a letter reviewed by CNN.
Harris, as a former vice president, received six months of protection after leaving office, according to federal law.
That period ended on July 21.
The White House and Secret Service did not immediately respond to CNN's requests for comment.
"The Vice President is grateful to the United States Secret Service for their professionalism, dedication, and unwavering commitment to safety," Kirsten Allen, a Harris senior adviser, told CNN.
Harris' husband, Doug Emhoff, lost his own personal detail on July 21 under the standard provisions for a former vice president's spouse."},{"url":"https://politics.stackexchange.com/questions/91112/trump-security-clearance-purge-is-there-any-practical-impact","title":"united states - Trump security clearance purge: is there any practical impact? - Politics Stack Exchange","content":"On March 22, 2025, President Trump revoked the security clearances of former President Joe Biden, VP Kamala Harris, and several other former officials.
I'm looking for examples from presidential memoirs, senior officials' accounts, or academic analyses that show concrete national security benefits from this practice.
See Bob Woodward's Bush at War trilogy for more complete details.
If they needed to contact any of the individuals on the list, it would be easy for Trump to grant them clearance, allowing them to access the required information."}]}

US President Donald Trump revoked security clearances from his previously defeated Democratic election rivals, Kamala Harris and Hillary Clinton,as well as a number of other former officials and critics. Trump said in February he was revoking security clearance for his predecessor Joe Biden. His order confirmed that decision, adding that he was also revoking the security clearance of \"any other member\" of the Biden family. \"I have determined that it is no longer in the national interest for the following individuals to access classified information,\" Trump's memorandum read. Former US presidents and top security officials usually keep their security clearance as a courtesy. \"This action includes, but is not limited to, receipt of classified briefings, such as the
